tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance. Creatinine is slightly low, which is generally not clinically significant. Chloride is mildly elevated and total CO₂ is low, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation for respiratory alkalosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
